articles.title: Even Alexi Lalas’s Fox teammates for the World Cup have grown tired of the former USMNT player’s studio act.
articles.description:
"Lalas has dished it out for a long time. If he can’t take it, well … what’s the word we’re looking for? Snowflake? Yes, I think that’s it."

The post Even Alexi Lalas’s Fox teammates for the World Cup have grown tired of the former USMNT player’s studio act. appeared first on Boston.com.
